atlas v0.5
Back To Families

Contemporary Web Family

Stage-Driven Showcase

A hero or first fold behaves like a stage. One image, scene, or world carries the page before the rest of the content unfolds.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined LuxuryCyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

Structure Fit

Immersive StageDossier / Feature

Interpretation

怎么借这条家族，而不是只模仿表面

Signature

  • single-scene drama
  • low-density first fold
  • strong visual memory
  • clear reveal into deeper layers

Borrow

  • one dominant scene at the top
  • sparse copy over a strong image
  • clear exits into deeper content

Best For

  • campaigns
  • flagship launches
  • film and entertainment
  • portfolio hero moments

Avoid When

  • the homepage must explain many parallel options
  • users need scanning more than immersion

Sample Gallery

真实网站样本

从真实站点看这条家族是怎样落地的。

Historical Roots

它从哪些更早的语言长出来

1920s-1930s

France / Europe / US

Art Deco / Streamlined Luxury

几何装饰、流线感和高级感并存。今天它更多以精致和舞台感回到网页中。

Descendant Families

Quiet Lifestyle EditorialStage-Driven Showcase
Open movement

1980s-present

Science fiction / game and tech culture

Cyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

高饱和霓虹、黑夜城市、技术感界面、世界观驱动。它更像视觉文化分支。

Descendant Families

Neon Techno-Futurist InterfaceStage-Driven Showcase
Open movement

Prompt DNA

可以直接给 agent 的风格 packet

Prompt DNA

Stage-Driven Showcase

Use a stage-driven showcase: let one scene dominate the fold, keep copy sparse, and reveal depth only after the first-image moment is established.

Reference Packet

继续打开真实站点看细节

  • A24
  • Apple MacBook Pro
  • Nowness

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.
